title: Yes Bank Global Group is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Yes Bank Global Group is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Yes Bank Global Group family as a Credit Analyst in Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Yes Bank Global Group:
Yes Bank Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yes Bank Global Group!
